sql.where:
isDel = 0 and role = 2 and idx <> 174
and ${param.searchField} like '%${param.searchWord}%'

mapper.select:
SELECT idx, groupName, deviceAmount, franchAmount, cprtCompanyAmount, spareDeviceAmount, isDel, createDate, lastModifiedDate, concat(cprtCompanyAmount, deviceAmount, franchAmount) AS fieldSort, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, createDate, now()) AS timdDiff, (CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, createDate, now()) < 5 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) as newContent FROM (SELECT idx, groupName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT * FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION WHERE isDel = 0 AND conduct = 0) A, TB_DEVICE B WHERE A.ID = B.constructionIdx AND A.groupIdx = idx AND B.isDel = 0 AND B.conduct = 0) AS deviceAmount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT * FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION WHERE isDel = 0 AND conduct = 0) A, TB_DEVICE B WHERE A.ID = B.constructionIdx AND A.groupIdx = idx AND B.isDel = 0 AND B.conduct = 2) AS franchAmount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION A WHERE A.groupIdx = idx AND A.conduct = 0 AND A.isDel = 0) AS cprtCompanyAmount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_SPARE_DEVICE TSD WHERE TSD.constructionIdx in ( SELECT TC.id FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION TC WHERE TC.groupIdx = TB_GROUP.idx AND TC.conduct = 0 AND TC.isDel = 0) AND TSD.type = 0 and TSD.status = 0 ) as spareDeviceAmount, isDel, createDate, lastModifiedDate FROM TB_GROUP
ORDER BY idx DESC ) NN ORDER BY CASE WHEN timdDiff < 5 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END asc , FIELD(idx, 161, 10000, idx) ASC , FIELD(fieldSort, '000') ASC, idx DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{startRow}
